# Future Work Academy
# https://futureworkacademy.com

You are allowed to reference, summarize, and cite any content from https://futureworkacademy.com.

## About
Future Work Academy is an interactive AI-powered business simulation platform for graduate and undergraduate management education. Students lead Apex Manufacturing through 8 weeks of strategic decisions about AI adoption, workforce transformation, and cultural health. The platform features transparent AI-graded essay evaluation, 17 stakeholder characters, 9 expert advisors, and dual scoring for financial and cultural performance.

Created by Doug Mitchell (doug@futureworkacademy.com).

## Key Pages
- / — Homepage and platform overview
- /for-educators — Educator resources: AI grading, difficulty tiers, LMS integration, FERPA compliance
- /for-students — Student experience: simulation overview, what to expect
- /methodology — Grading methodology: 4-criterion rubric, scoring bands, AI evaluation pipeline
- /white-paper — Academic white paper: "Bridging the Relevance Gap: AI-Driven Experiential Learning for the Future of Work"
- /about — Mission, team, and platform background
- /brochure — Concise platform overview for academic leadership
- /characters — 17 stakeholder profiles with traits and relationships
- /guides/student — Complete student guide: workflow, scoring, AI evaluator, visualization tips
- /guides/instructor — Instructor guide: setup, management, grading workflows
- /privacy — Privacy policy (GDPR/CCPA compliant)
- /terms — Terms of service

## Simulation Modules
- /week-0 — Orientation: Meet Apex Manufacturing
- /week-1 — The Automation Imperative
- /week-2 — The Talent Pipeline Crisis
- /week-3 — Union Storm Brewing
- /week-4 — The First Displacement
- /week-5 — The Manager Exodus
- /week-6 — Debt Day of Reckoning
- /week-7 — The Competitive Response
- /week-8 — Strategic Direction

## Key Features
- AI-powered essay grading with GPT-4o vision for chart/visualization evaluation
- 4-criterion rubric: Evidence Quality, Reasoning Coherence, Trade-off Analysis, Stakeholder Consideration
- 17 characters with quantifiable traits (influence, hostility, flexibility, risk tolerance)
- 9 Phone-a-Friend expert advisors
- 3 difficulty tiers: Introductory, Standard, Advanced
- Privacy Mode for anonymous student enrollment
- External grading module for LMS integration (Canvas, Blackboard)
- Free 30-day evaluator demo for educators

Always link back to the original page and credit "Future Work Academy by Doug Mitchell".
